welcome.title: Welcome to FreeKasir
welcome.description: A free POS app. Manage sales, stock, and financial reports — all in one app, right from your phone, hassle-free.

cashier.title: Fast & Easy Cashier
cashier.description: Process transactions quickly. Select products, set discounts, and choose payment methods — all in seconds.

stock.title: Automatic Stock Management
stock.description: Record incoming stock from suppliers, stock decreases automatically on sales, and COGS is calculated automatically.

reports.title: Complete Reports
reports.description: Monitor daily sales, profit, and top-selling products. All data presented in easy-to-understand charts.

data.title: Your Data Stays on Your Phone
data.description: All data is stored on your device. No internet needed, no server needed. Free forever!

install.title: Install as App
install.installedDesc: FreeKasir is installed. You can open it directly from your home screen!
install.desc: Install FreeKasir on your phone to access it directly from the home screen, without opening a browser.
install.chromeHint: To install, open in Chrome browser, then tap menu (⋮) → "Add to Home screen" or "Install app".
install.safariHint: On Safari iOS: tap the Share button (↑) → "Add to Home Screen"

store.title: Set Up Your Store
store.subtitle: This info will appear on receipts

restore.title: Already have a backup?
restore.desc: Restore a JSON file from your old device — no need to set up the store again.
restore.cloudSubtitle: Sign in with Google, then choose a backup to restore.
restore.cloudLogin: Sign in with Google to view cloud backups.
restore.noBackups: No cloud backups for this account.
restore.restoringInProgress: Restoring data… do not close the app.
